CustomField.description: Per-question coaching note written by Penny via Gemini after ScoreAssessment fires. For Multiple-Choice: Penny explains why the wrong answer was wrong, what the correct answer teaches. For Open-Ended: Penny provides qualitative rubric-based feedback.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Per-question coaching note written by Penny via Gemini after ScoreAssessment fires. For Multiple-Choice: Penny explains why the wrong answer was wrong, what the correct answer teaches. For Open-Ended: Penny provides qualitative rubric-based feedback.
CustomField.label: Penny Coaching Note
